LightningComponentBundle.description: Rich text editor flow screen component that uploads pasted images as real ContentDocuments so they post inline to the native Chatter feed. Supports optional @mentions.

property.name: recordId
property.label: Parent Record Id
property.description: The record to link uploaded images to and post the FeedItem on. Pass {!recordId} from flow context.

property.name: placeholder
property.label: Placeholder Text
property.default: Type your comment here. Paste screenshots directly with Ctrl+V...

property.name: disableAdvancedTools
property.label: Disable Advanced Tools
property.description: If true, toolbar only shows basic formatting (bold, italic, underline, list, link).

property.name: hideVisibilitySelector
property.label: Hide Visibility Selector
property.description: Hide the 'To' dropdown and always use Default Visibility.

property.name: hideMentionButton
property.label: Hide Mention Button
property.description: Hide the Mention button if you don't want mention support.

property.name: richTextValue
property.label: Rich Text Value
property.description: Bidirectional. Read this in subsequent flow elements to get the HTML to post.

property.name: selectedVisibility
property.label: Selected Visibility
property.description: Bidirectional. Read this to get the user's choice (InternalUsers or AllUsers).
